ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot gazing upward at the night sky, filled with stars. The robot will use both arms to create a gesture that complements this feeling of wonder and contemplation.  The animation will start with the arms at rest, then move to a position of looking upward, and finally end with a contemplative pose.  Given the robot's lack of elbows, I will focus on the shoulder joints to create a natural-looking upward gaze. The transitions will be smooth, but each frame will represent a distinct position.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready for the night
both arms lift slightly, beginning to look up
arms rise higher, gazing into the starry expanse
right arm lifts further, lost in cosmic wonder
